title: Cirrus: Verify manpages for all subcommands exist

comments.body:
@edsantiago just confirming, the last item shows positive results for this check ya?

https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4826912437305344
Yes. A problem will be reported via `diff` output; and, of course, exit code will be 1.
@edsantiago thanks.  @mheon I got your suggestion working and passing.  okay I believe this is ready to go it (barring test flakes).
/test images
@mheon @baude PTAL, this should be ready to merge.
We want `make clean` before the rest in part because it blows away some generated files in the libpod root and regenerates them; I think you'll need to keep it around in the build tests

>  it blows away some generated files

Oh you're right, entrypoint.sh does not use --delete option.

@mheon okay, added ``--delete``.  I prefer that to 'make clean' because it involves less typing :grin:
If you *really* think we need `clean` instead/also, I won't be upset.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2650) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@mheon okay, all set now.
(rebased and --force pushed)
LGTM
/lgtm
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2711) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
(rebased and --force pushed)
(rebased and --force pushed)
Fixed again....okay this is ready to go.
/lgtm
/approve

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
